description: Map Google Calendar events to unified events timeline
sql: SELECT 'gcalendar' as source, id as source_id, start_date::TIMESTAMP as start_at, end_date::TIMESTAMP as end_at, CASE WHEN start_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (end_date::TIMESTAMP - start_date::TIMESTAMP)) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END as duration_min, summary as title, description, location, CASE WHEN all_day THEN 'all-day' ELSE 'calendar' END as category, all_day, json_object('calendar_id', calendar_id, 'status', status, 'attendees', attendees_count, 'organizer', organizer_email) as event_metadata FROM sources.gcalendar__events WHERE start_date IS NOT NULL
